description.ko: 지질학적 시간의 리듬감 있는 패턴, 광물 퇴적, 그리고 우리 행성의 물리적 정체성을 정의하는 가공되지 않은 유기적 질감을 포착하여 지구 표면을 심도 있게 탐구합니다.
description.en: A profound exploration of the Earth's surface, capturing the rhythmic patterns of geological time, mineral sedimentation, and the raw, organic textures that define our planet's physical identity.

prompt: Ultra-detailed top-down satellite view of diverse earth textures, featuring cracked arid mud flats merging into rich volcanic soil, intricate mineral veins in oxidized copper and deep iron rust, realistic topography, macro textures of moss and lichen on granite, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, geological survey aesthetic.
